title: cenchrus mutilatus
intro: Cenchrus mutilatus, commonly known as the sandbur or sand burs, is a type of annual or perennial plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Cenchrus mutilatus include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in topical applications to soothe and calm irritated skin.
